wikitext:
{{Relic Infobox|Crossbow|2}}
{{R|Crossbow||2}} is an {{QueryLink|Relics|rarity:Ancient|Ancient|2}} {{2|Relics|Relic}}. The description is somewhat misleading, as the {{KW|Energy||2}}-reduction effect will be lost once played. Even if it's the same turn, if the affected card is played and then returned to the hand by any means (e.g. using {{C|Hologram||2}}), the card will be at its original cost.

== Sources ==
At the start of {{2|Acts#Act 3|Act 3}}, can be offered by {{KW|Tanx||2}}.
